title: Balapur Fort
tagline: Balapur Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Balapur Fort is a Mughal fortress in the town of Balapur in the Akola district of India.
overview.description: Balapur Fort is a Mughal fortress in the town of Balapur in the Akola district of India. Construction on the fort was started by Mirza Azam Shah, the son of Emperor Aurangzeb and it was completed by Ismaeel Khan, the Nawab of Elichpur in 1757. The chhatri of Raja Man Singh I, a canopy constructed by Mirza Raja Jaisingh, has an area of 25 square feet and a height of 33 feet. Its foundations were heavily damaged in a great flood called the 'dhvdya pur' which occurred more than 100 years ago, but after some years the damage was repaired at a cost of Rs 3,000 received from Jaipur.

topPlaces.name: Paras Thermal Power Station
topPlaces.description: "Paras Thermal Power Plant" is located at Paras, in the Akola district of Maharashtra. The power plant is a coal based power plant operated by Mahagenco.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Balapur Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Balapur Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Balapur Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jalgaon Airport (124 km) and the nearest railway station is Aurangabad Railway Station (175 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Balapur Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Balapur Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Balapur Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Balapur Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Balapur Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Paras Thermal Power Station.
